case_title: BEN JIANG YAO VS. ELENA LAUCHUNG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-13-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-13-2021 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF BEN JIANG YAO IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTPRETER REBECCA CHAU. WITNESS FOR THE PLAINTIFF PETER YAO (SON) AND SHIRLEY YAO (SPOUSE).
